title: Buttery Chewy Festive Grape Nuts Crumble
description: A festive Venezuelan dish featuring buttery and chewy grape nut cereal, caramelized to perfection and vegetarian-friendly for a delightful breakfast treat.
instructions: Combine Grape Nuts, sugar, and a pinch of salt in an oven-safe bowl.
Pour melted butter over the cereal mixture and mix well until evenly coated.
Stir in orange juice. Ensure it is fully combined for even caramelizing.
Transfer mixture to a baking dish lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 20 minutes or until golden brown, stirring every 5 minutes to prevent sticking.
Remove from oven and let cool completely before crumbling into pieces.
